brief_justification: Paper A's machinery is the parameter-shift rule: an exact analytic recipe for gradients of boson-sampling transition probabilities by evaluating the circuit at discretely shifted parameter values. Paper B's machinery is an information-theoretic complexity measure (clustering-weighted multivariate multiscale sample entropy) with a strongly-consistent plug-in estimator over a partitioned trajectory ensemble. Exact differentiation of a quantum probability versus weighted-entropy estimation of a population distribution share no governing process, variables, or transition/threshold, so no role-for-role mapping holds.
